certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in approved mode and installed, initialized and configured as specified in Section 11.1 of the Security Policy.
certificate.description: The VMware's Linux Kernel Cryptographic Module 5.0.0 offers symmetric encryption/decryption, digital signature generation/verification, hashing, cryptographic key generation, random number generation, message authentication, and key establishment functions to secure data.
